# MuleSoft Zuora Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (6.0) of Zuora Connector documentation.
> See [Zuora Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/zuora-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Zuora Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Zuora Connector 6.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/zuora-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Zuora Connector 6.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/zuora-connector/latest/zuora-connector-examples.md)
- [Zuora Connector 6.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/zuora-connector/latest/zuora-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Zuora Connector 6.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/zuora-connector/latest/zuora-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Zuora Connector to 6.0.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/zuora-connector/latest/zuora-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Zuora XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/zuora-connector/latest/zuora-connector-xml-maven.md)
